title: bromus loliaceus
intro: Bromus loliaceus, also known as meadow brome, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Bromus loliaceus include treating digestive issues, soothing respiratory problems, and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
